initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';
